dataProvenance.note: This dashboard combines data from multiple sources with different provenance. Fields below document the source of each major section.
dataProvenance.disclaimer: All performance numbers are paper simulation only. No real money, broker execution, or live trading is involved.

chartDataSources.note: Each chart key is labeled by its primary data source. real_paper = from paper simulation outputs, real_market = from Alpaca IEX feed, synthetic_analytics = from analytics pipeline, sample_fallback = deterministic sample when real data is unavailable.

disclaimers: No broker, API, payment, or social auto-posting behavior is enabled.

vehicleUniverse.vehicleCountNote: Target was 150 vehicles. Reached 149. Limited by available data source.

learningMode.label: Aggressive Paper Learning Mode
learningMode.description: This mode intentionally allows more small paper trades so the system can learn from both wins and failures. No live trading is enabled.
